channel.title: GitHub Kotlin Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Kotlin in GitHub

item.title: aniyomiorg/aniyomi
item.description: An app for manga and anime

item.title: gkd-kit/gkd
item.description: 基于无障碍，高级选择器，订阅规则的自定义屏幕点击 Android 应用 | An Android APP with custom screen tapping based on Accessibility, Advanced Selectors, and Subscription Rules

item.title: RikkaApps/Shizuku
item.description: Using system APIs directly with adb/root privileges from normal apps through a Java process started with app_process.

item.title: jellyfin/jellyfin-androidtv
item.description: Android TV Client for Jellyfin

item.title: JunkFood02/Seal
item.description: 🦭 Video/Audio Downloader for Android, based on yt-dlp, designed with Material You

item.title: Arturo254/OpenTune
item.description: Un cliente de YouTube Music con Material Design 3, para Android

item.title: tiann/KernelSU
item.description: A Kernel based root solution for Android

item.title: z-huang/InnerTune
item.description: A Material 3 YouTube Music client for Android

item.title: KotatsuApp/Kotatsu
item.description: Manga reader for Android

item.title: breezy-weather/breezy-weather
item.description: A Material Design Weather Application

item.title: vfsfitvnm/ViMusic
item.description: An Android application for streaming music from YouTube Music.

item.title: Shabinder/SpotiFlyer
item.description: Kotlin Multiplatform Music Downloader, Supports Spotify / Gaana / Youtube Music / Jio Saavn / SoundCloud.

item.title: deniscerri/ytdlnis
item.description: Android Video/Audio Downloader app using yt-dlp

item.title: Dr-TSNG/Hide-My-Applist
item.description: An Xposed module to intercept applist detections

item.title: d4rken-org/sdmaid-se
item.description: SD Maid 2/SE is Android's most thorough cleaning tool.

item.title: 2dust/v2rayNG
item.description: A V2Ray client for Android, support Xray core and v2fly core

item.title: DerGoogler/MMRL
item.description: MMRL is an Android app that helps manage your own modules repository.

item.title: bmax121/APatch
item.description: The patching of Android kernel and Android system

item.title: yairm210/Unciv
item.description: Open-source Android/Desktop remake of Civ V

item.title: florisboard/florisboard
item.description: An open-source keyboard for Android which respects your privacy. Currently in early-beta.

item.title: Swordfish90/Lemuroid
item.description: All in one emulator on Android!

item.title: Mahmud0808/Iconify
item.description: Iconify lets you customize your Android 12+ device easily. Change icons, colors, shapes, and even the notification panel for a personalized look that suits your style.
